name: voyant-bookings-booking-create-dialog
title: Booking Create Dialog
description: Operator booking-create workflow composing every picker section (product, departure, rooms, person, shared-room, travelers, price breakdown, voucher, payment schedule) and submitting atomically via POST /v1/bookings/create. Consumed by BookingDialog for the create branch; apps that need a bespoke flow can install the sections individually and assemble their own dialog.
